name: Mooch
preceding_figure_names: Basic In Place, Fallaway Rock, Link, Reverse Whip, Whip
following_figure_names: Basic In Place, Fallaway Rock, Fallaway Throwaway, Change of Places Right to Left, Walks, Stalking Walks, Flicks and Break
notes: On Flicks: ankle and instep are stretched. Variations: (lady: normal opposite). "Bobby" Hops: repeat. aQ: slight hop on RF and at same time flick LF off floor. aQ: slight hop on RF and at same time close LF to RF. "Flick Cross" action: repeat. aQ: Slight hop on RF and at same time flick LF off floor. A: Spring to LF, crossing it well in front of RF, RF slightly off floor at back.

steps.action: Step back in RSP, turn lady to left
comments: use LH turn lady to R, then release L to R hand hold.
Let R hand slide further around lady's back.
turn starts at end of previous beat.

steps.action: Replace weight to RF in RSP, retain position
Step back in RSP, turn starts at end of previous beat
comments: Q: RF back in RSP | 1/4 to R
turn starts at end of previous beat
Lady slide L hand across Man's shoulder on 1.
